reference: General anesthesia should not have much effect after three weeks of surgery. You can take paracetamol for symptomatic relief; it is safe for kidney patients. If the problem persists, please consult a neurologist.
text: General anesthetics do not have much effect after three weeks of surgery. You can take paracetamol for symptomatic relief. It is safe to continue. If the problem persists, please consult a neurologist.
